Class StyleMaps

java.lang.Object
com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.parser.StyleMaps
public final class StyleMaps extends Object

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Map<String, BackgroundCode>
    backgroundCodes
    A static, unmodifiable map that associates lowercase background color names (keys) with their corresponding BackgroundCode enum constants (values).
    static final Map<String, ColorCode>
    colorCodes
    A static, unmodifiable map that associates lowercase color names (keys) with their corresponding ColorCode enum constants (values).
    static final Map<String, StyleCode>
    styleCodes
    A static, unmodifiable map that associates lowercase style names (keys) with their corresponding StyleCode enum constants (values).

      public static final Map<String, BackgroundCode> backgroundCodes
      A static, unmodifiable map that associates lowercase background color names (keys) with their corresponding BackgroundCode enum constants (values).

      public static final Map<String, StyleCode> styleCodes
